'''Aliens in the Empire''' is an online supplement to [[Star Wars Insider 96|''Star Wars Insider'' 96]] and [[Star Wars Insider 97|97]]. The articles are written by [[Abel G. Peña]] and [[Rich Handley]], and are an exclusive [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] publication. Part 1 was published on [[November 7]], [[2007]] and Part 2 on [[December 4]].

Written as a supplement to ''[[Strangers Among Us: The Aliens Who Built the Galactic Empire]]'', Part 1 focused on the characters [[Mammon Hoole]], [[Borborygmus Gog]], [[Cartariun]] and [[Suprema|Ampotem Za]], while Part 2 featured [[Hethrir]], [[Stafuv Rahz]], [[Kharys]] and [[Bentilais san Sk'ar]].

Originally a third installment was mooted, which would have featured the [[Most High Proctor]] of [[Thebeon 8]] and Senator [[Mzerc]] from ''[[Princess Leia, Imperial Servant]]''; however, this installment was aborted.<ref name="tfn">{{JCFCite|url=posts/28212312|board=Authors and Artists|thread=The Official Abel G. Pena Discussion Thread|user=Halagad_Ventor|date=2008-03-18|time=11:03 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20150907221744/http://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-abel-g-pena-discussion-thread.18750535/page-16}}</ref>
